svg.title: How one filter in block 2 combines all 32 input channels
svg.desc: A 3x3x32 filter slides over the 32 input feature maps and computes a dot product across all channels at each position, producing one output value per position
svg.text: Each of the 64 filters learns a different combination of the 32 input channels.
Filter 0 might mix ch 3 + ch 17. Filter 1 might mostly use ch 0 + ch 22. The network decides.
